response.justification: Aisha brings solid full-stack engineering breadth and genuine high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of RPS, low-latency async I/O), but the core requirements of this Principal/IC6 role — owning experimentation frameworks, building telemetry/metrics infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout risk management, and growth measurement platforms — are entirely absent from the resume. The career trajectory is generalist full-stack rather than a specialization in growth or experimentation systems, and there is no evidence of the cross-team technical leadership or Principal-level platform ownership this role demands.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and low-latency architectures
Polyglot engineer with hands-on production experience in C, C++, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, and C# — matching the required language profile
Strong software craftsmanship foundations (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated consistently across multiple roles
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout risk management experience — the central focus of this role
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, or statistical/experimental analysis work evident anywhere in the resume
No Principal-level scope demonstrated: no evidence of owning multi-team technical strategy, cross-org influence, or systemic platform leadership

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or telemetry platform experience
